title: Manage soils to enhance sustainability
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage soils to enhance sustainability demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify characteristics of regional and local soils to assess their current health

pcs.text: Identify common characteristics and limitations of regional and local soils
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify common characteristics and limitations of regional and local soils?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify common characteristics and limitations of regional and local soils.

pcs.text: Refer to paddock assessment to establish soil characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer to paddock assessment to establish soil characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer to paddock assessment to establish soil characteristics.

pcs.text: Research soil biota and its relationship to soil fertility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research soil biota and its relationship to soil fertility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research soil biota and its relationship to soil fertility.

pcs.text: Evaluate current production practices and their contribution to land degradation and soil problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate current production practices and their contribution to land degradation and soil problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate current production practices and their contribution to land degradation and soil problems.

pcs.text: Identify and select land preparation methods matched to machinery and equipment to maintain and improve soil productivity and structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select land preparation methods matched to machinery and equipment to maintain and improve soil productivity and structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select land preparation methods matched to machinery and equipment to maintain and improve soil productivity and structure.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify characteristics of regional and local soils to assess their current health

elements.title: Develop a plan to improve and maintain the health of soils

pcs.text: Identify the impact of weather and climate on operational activities, soil structure and fertility, and develop contingency plans to account for climatic or other events
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the impact of weather and climate on operational activities, soil structure and fertility, and develop contingency plans to account for climatic or other events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the impact of weather and climate on operational activities, soil structure and fertility, and develop contingency plans to account for climatic or other events.

pcs.text: Compare and interpret soil test analysis with historical data, and incorporate into plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare and interpret soil test analysis with historical data, and incorporate into plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare and interpret soil test analysis with historical data, and incorporate into plan.

pcs.text: Select nutrients to meet specific plant or crop requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select nutrients to meet specific plant or crop requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select nutrients to meet specific plant or crop requirements.

pcs.text: Evaluate alternative strategies or products to improve soil fertility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate alternative strategies or products to improve soil fertility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate alternative strategies or products to improve soil fertility.

pcs.text: Develop a soil amendment strategy, including soil ameliorating activities and soil ameliorant products to enhance sustainability of soil health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a soil amendment strategy, including soil ameliorating activities and soil ameliorant products to enhance sustainability of soil health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a soil amendment strategy, including soil ameliorating activities and soil ameliorant products to enhance sustainability of soil health.

pcs.text: Select appropriate production crops suitable for soil type and climate for a land use rotation plan to improve or maintain soil productivity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate production crops suitable for soil type and climate for a land use rotation plan to improve or maintain soil productivity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate production crops suitable for soil type and climate for a land use rotation plan to improve or maintain soil productivity.

pcs.text: Determine soil conservation strategies to minimise soil erosion and increase soil capacity, productivity and sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil conservation strategies to minimise soil erosion and increase soil capacity, productivity and sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil conservation strategies to minimise soil erosion and increase soil capacity, productivity and sustainability.

pcs.text: Assess the environmental implications of chemical use, and consider and document alternative methods and organic preventive methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the environmental implications of chemical use, and consider and document alternative methods and organic preventive methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the environmental implications of chemical use, and consider and document alternative methods and organic preventive methods.

pcs.text: Develop a strategy to improve and maintain the health of soils
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a strategy to improve and maintain the health of soils?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a strategy to improve and maintain the health of soils.

pcs.text: Develop a strategy to monitor and report soil health and productivity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a strategy to monitor and report soil health and productivity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a strategy to monitor and report soil health and productivity.

pcs.text: Document the soil health and productivity plan, and communicate to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the soil health and productivity plan, and communicate to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the soil health and productivity plan, and communicate to stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop a plan to improve and maintain the health of soils

elements.title: Implement plan for improvement and maintenance of a healthy soil

pcs.text: Implement a schedule for soil improvement, taking into account seasonal, geographical and resource factors, and stock or crop rotation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement a schedule for soil improvement, taking into account seasonal, geographical and resource factors, and stock or crop rotation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement a schedule for soil improvement, taking into account seasonal, geographical and resource factors, and stock or crop rotation.

pcs.text: Implement strategies to integrate methods of soil improvement operations with land use rotation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement strategies to integrate methods of soil improvement operations with land use rotation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement strategies to integrate methods of soil improvement operations with land use rotation.

pcs.text: Determine key staff responsibilities for specific implementation processes, and allocate duties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine key staff responsibilities for specific implementation processes, and allocate duties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine key staff responsibilities for specific implementation processes, and allocate duties.

pcs.text: Modify plan to meet contingencies, and communicate to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify plan to meet contingencies, and communicate to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify plan to meet contingencies, and communicate to staff.

pcs.text: Record and file soil management activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and file soil management activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and file soil management activities according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement plan for improvement and maintenance of a healthy soil

elements.title: Review plan, implementation strategy and the outcomes and determine necessary modifications

pcs.text: Analyse effectiveness of the soil improvement management plan through evaluation at key points, making adjustments where outcomes fall outside plan projections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse effectiveness of the soil improvement management plan through evaluation at key points, making adjustments where outcomes fall outside plan projections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse effectiveness of the soil improvement management plan through evaluation at key points, making adjustments where outcomes fall outside plan projections.

pcs.text: Prepare recommendations for future strategies, based on the analysis of paddock observations and production data, to further enhance soil ecosystem and production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare recommendations for future strategies, based on the analysis of paddock observations and production data, to further enhance soil ecosystem and production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare recommendations for future strategies, based on the analysis of paddock observations and production data, to further enhance soil ecosystem and production.
